---
title: "Kaihui Song: Subnational Climate Actions"
description: ""
image: /files/headshots/kaihui-song.jpg
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: ""
categories: [Climate and Governance]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.kaihuisong.com/  #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/kaihui-song.jpg
      title: "Kaihui Song"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Postdoc, University of California, Berkeley"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title

Subnational Climate Actions


### Time

Monday, , 2025, 
6:00PM - 7:00PM ET

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please [register](https://forms.gle/65hnhJPmnYaz5utG9) to participate.

## About

Dr. Song will share her research on subnational climate actions.


## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio

Dr. Kaihui Song is a Postdoctoral Scholar in the Energy and Resources Group at UC Berkeley. 


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
